name: Krautfleisch- Pork Casserole w/ Cabbage
recipeIngredient: 2 lb Pork cut into 1/2 inch cubes
recipeInstructions:
1. Toss the pork cubes in seasoned flour and caraway seeds.
2. Heat lard in a pan and sauté the meat with a lid on, shaking from time to time until browned for 10 minutes.
3. Add ground paprika and sliced onions, cooking for a few more minutes.
4. Stir in tomato puree, shredded cabbage or sauerkraut, vinegar, and water. Season with salt.
5. Simmer gently for 1 1/2 hours until the meat is tender.
6. Add sour cream or plain yogurt at the last minute.
